summary: Heavily focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform with AI components, alongside embedded firmware for HID emulation, a Windows input driver, and several machine learning research projects in crypto prediction and computer vision.

items.title: Windows input filter driver development
items.description: Built a KMDF input filter driver for capturing and injecting keyboard and mouse events on Windows.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform development
items.description: Iterated on the core trading platform, building out infrastructure, execution engine, billing, and deployment pipelines.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID emulation firmware
items.description: Drafted a new firmware variant for the ESP32-S3 mouse and keyboard emulation project.

items.title: Computer vision utility for gaming
items.description: Worked on a personal C++ project involving screen capture, input emulation, and YOLO-based aim assist.

items.title: E-ink reader custom firmware
items.description: Developed custom firmware features for an e-ink device, including a map application and knowledge base.

items.title: Proxy utility maintenance
items.description: Updated a Flutter-based proxy client with new transport support and dependency fixes.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model research
items.description: Conducted machine learning experiments on a crypto price prediction model, iterating on architectures like Mixture of Experts.

items.title: Android LLM assistant with phone control
items.description: Built an on-device LLM assistant for Android, focusing on sub-agent delegation and tool-use strategies.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher
items.description: Developed a minimalist Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink devices.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, including CI/CD and store publishing setup.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Built a code intelligence engine that indexes codebases into a knowledge graph for AI agents.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Maintained a fork of a Telegram client node for n8n workflow automation.

items.title: Personal Neovim development environment
items.description: Set up and maintained a personal Neovim configuration for full IDE capabilities.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Created a fast, minimalistic on-host labeling tool for YOLO object detection projects.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Iterated on a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games, improving hand and card detection.

items.title: Touch-based task management app
items.description: Worked on a Kotlin task management application with touch event visualization.

items.title: Crypto trading platform foundation
items.description: Laid the groundwork for a SaaS crypto trading platform, including initial scaffolding and core infrastructure.

items.title: HID firmware iterations
items.description: Developed multiple firmware versions for ESP32-S3 HID emulation, adding BLE, USB, and touch capabilities.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant with worktree management and Git integration.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Telegram multi-bot manager for Freqtrade
items.description: Built a C# web application to manage multiple Freqtrade bots via Telegram.

items.title: Freqtrade monitoring mobile app
items.description: Created a Flutter mobile app for monitoring Freqtrade bot performance and profits.

items.title: Telegram automation and content collection
items.description: Worked on Telegram bot automation tools for content forwarding and summarization.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy hyperoptimization
items.description: Conducted hyperparameter optimization and backtesting for various Freqtrade trading strategies.

items.title: Crypto trading signal bot
items.description: Developed a Python bot for generating and posting crypto trading signals with AI-powered analysis.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET Telegram bot integrating ChatGPT for conversational AI.
